description:
there should be a repository of APIs. 
So that LLMs can interact with the realworld. 
Maybe MCPs are the right thing. 
Does booking have an MCP? 
Otherwise we could build a website that adapts APIs like the one from booking to MCP

status.comment: Implemented API integration repository in subdev/experience-mining/integrations with MCP-aware recommendation/fallback logic and focused tests; verified via node --test and targeted TypeScript noEmit typecheck.
